title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 35
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to the library.
questions.audio_script: Woman: How are you getting to the library tomorrow? I thought you were going to take the bus. || Man: I was, but the bus drivers are on strike. || Woman: Could you use the bike instead? || Man: I checked, but the roads are too busy. [1]I am going to walk because it is just across the park[/1]. || Woman: That sounds sensible. I will meet you near the entrance when you arrive. || Man: Great. I will send a message if I am late. || Man: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: How are you getting to the library tomorrow? I thought you were going to take the bus.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I was, but the bus drivers are on strike.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Could you use the bike instead?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I checked, but the roads are too busy. I am going to walk because it is just across the park.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That sounds sensible. I will meet you near the entrance when you arrive.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Great. I will send a message if I am late.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.question: How will the speaker get to the library?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, person at a bus stop, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, person walking through a park, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, person riding a bicycle, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The speaker says they are going to walk because it is just across the park.

questions.context: You hear two people choosing food at a bakery.
questions.audio_script: Boy: Have you chosen what to eat at the bakery? The queue is moving quickly now. || Girl: I nearly chose the croissant, and I also looked at the cake. || Boy: They both look fine to me. || Girl: Maybe, but the sweet things are for the party later. [1]I am going to have the brown bread[/1]. It should be enough before we leave. || Boy: Good choice. I will order mine after you, and then we can sit near the window. || Boy: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a lost notebook.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Did you find your notebook? You looked everywhere this morning. || Girl: Not at first. I went back to the art room, because I remembered drawing a plan there. || Woman: What about the sports hall? You were there later. || Girl: I checked, but it was not there. Then my friend called and said [1]my notebook was beside the piano in music class[/1]. I must have left it there before school. || Woman: That is lucky. You need it today, don't you? || Girl: Yes, I'll collect it before lunch.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Did you find your notebook? You looked everywhere this morning.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Not at first. I went back to the art room, because I remembered drawing a plan there.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: What about the sports hall? You were there later.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I checked, but it was not there. Then my friend called and said my notebook was beside the piano in music class. I must have left it there before school.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That is lucky. You need it today, don't you?

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Yes, I'll collect it before lunch.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about buying gift for my grandmother.
questions.audio_script: Man: I need to buy gift for my grandmother, but I cannot decide. I first thought about a chocolates. || Woman: That might be nice. What about a scarf? || Man: I looked at one, but it was too expensive. In the end, [1]I chose a plant because she likes looking after things on her balcony[/1]. || Woman: That sounds useful, and it is better than buying something just because it looks pretty. || Man: I agree. I will wrap it when I get home tonight. || Man: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

dialogue.speaker: man

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a part-time job at a supermarket.
questions.audio_script: Man: What job are you doing at the supermarket this afternoon? I thought you had to stack fruit. || Woman: I did last week, but the delivery is late. || Man: Are you going to work at the till then? || Woman: No, because another assistant is there. The manager just told me that [1]I need to check prices on shelves[/1]. || Man: That sounds easier than the other jobs. || Woman: Maybe, but I still have to finish before five, because the place gets busy then. || Woman: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about jobs at home.
questions.audio_script: Woman: What job do you have to do at home before lunch? I thought you were going to water the plants. || Man: No, it rained last night. || Woman: Then are you going to sweep the path? || Man: Not today, because the wind will make it dirty again. Mum said [1]my job is to prepare the salad[/1]. || Woman: That should not take too long. || Man: I hope not. I want to finish before my friend comes round, so we can go out together. || Man: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.context: You hear two friends making plans after school.
questions.audio_script: Man: Are we still having a picnic after school? I brought everything for it. || Boy: I don't think so. It may rain all afternoon, so it will not work today. || Man: We could try the museum instead. || Boy: I thought about that, but the new show has not opened. My cousin sent me a message, and [1]we are going bowling this afternoon instead[/1]. || Man: Fine. Shall we meet by the bus stop at four? || Boy: Yes, and bring your student card, because they sometimes ask for it.
